name: An Isotropy-Preserving Spectral Cap for Muon: Theory and Three Case Studies

description: arXiv:2607.19771v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Muon and related matrix-sign optimizers are increasingly used to pre-train large language models, but their effect on the internal geometry of individual weight matrices is not well understood. This preliminary report proposes a unified framework built on a single idealizing assumption -- exact scale invariance of the loss under weight rescaling...
author: Jiachun Li
